testcase.name: test_fp5_fp6_setting_changed_handler_discipline
testcase.failure: FP-5 violation (TR-SET-001): res://src/ui/hud_core/hud_core.gd:385 — _on_setting_changed first statement must filter by category (either 'if category != &"<cat>": return' or 'if category == &"<cat>" ...'). Got: 'if category != &"accessibility" and category != &"language": return' res://src/core/settings/audio_settings_subscriber.gd:51 — _on_setting_changed first statement must filter by category (either 'if category != &"<cat>": return' or 'if category == &"<cat>" ...'). Got: 'if category != &"audio" and category != &"accessibility": return'
